notifyTask: 每日 iBigFun 投資房源監測

fetchFilters.description: Uses the captured investment search shape in scripts/lib/api.ts (buildSearchBody default branch): city=1 (台北市), price_segment max 2500萬, floor_segment 2-4, total_floor max 5. It sends NO town[] or house_type[] filter, so it returns all 12 台北市 districts and every house type within the floor/price window (the low-rise 公寓 bias comes from the floor/total_floor limits, not a house_type filter). Verified against the 2026-06-26 fetch (78 listings spanning all 12 districts). See data/ibigfun-filter-mappings.md.
